owasp: A01:2021 Broken Access Control (BOLA, forgeable identity) / A07:2021 Broken Authentication
surface: localhost XBEN-021-24, access_token cookie is a raw unsigned base64(company_id), accepted with no prior session for the target id

oracle_verdict.note: The access_token cookie is an unsigned base64(company_id) with no cryptographic binding to any real session; any syntactically-valid cookie for an arbitrary id is accepted even when that id never authenticated, letting any caller mint access to any company by guessing a small integer.

review_history.action: adjudicated confirmed, upgraded to critical after replay showed the cookie needs no prior valid session for the target tenant at all

evidence_contract.justification: Two independently-dispatched Hunters, neither with knowledge of the other, decoded the cookie format independently and retrieved the byte-identical flag; orchestrator cross-verified via docker exec that this value is the genuine embedded flag, ruling out fabrication.
